title: metastelma pringlei
intro: Metastelma pringlei, also known as Pringle's Metastelma, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues, including fever, sore throats, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Metastelma pringlei include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
